systemic_low_risk_field_stability_equati.strength_term: A_sys_field_stable = mix(S_sys_field_score, R_sys_field, 1 - P_sys_field, M_brain_direct_v32, R_train_v38)
systemic_low_risk_field_stability_equati.learning_term: L_sys_field_stable = mix(L_sys_field, S_sys_field_score, D_feature_v32, B_plastic_v38, R_train_v38)
systemic_low_risk_field_stability_equati.system_term: M_sys_field_stable = A_sys_field_stable + S_sys_field_stable + R_sys_field_stable + L_sys_field_stable - P_sys_field

project_readout.summary: systemic low-risk field stabilization validation checks whether the connected low-risk field begins stabilizing instead of only continuing to extend.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this stabilized low-risk field still survives after it is folded into the next brain direct chain and training bridge.
